name: Arizer XQ2
summary: A whip-and-balloon desktop vaporiser for home patients who want long, relaxed sessions.
description: The XQ2 is Arizer's desktop dry-herb vaporiser with full digital temperature control set on an onboard LED screen. It offers two delivery methods — a whip for direct draws and balloon filling for hands-free sessions — with an improved airflow system over the older Extreme Q. The glass vapour path keeps flavour clean across a wide temperature range. It suits patients who medicate at home and want a mains-powered device with no battery to manage. It is mains-only and not portable, so think of it as your home base rather than a travel device.
